title: Recruitment of Deputy Chief Commissioner and a Commissioner to the Equality Commission for Northern Ireland
body: "The Secretary of State for Northern Ireland invites applications for the appointment of a Deputy Chief Commissioner and Commissioner to the Equality Commission for Northern Ireland.   Further details for the position of Deputy Chief Commissioner, including terms of appointment and an application pack are available for download here.  Further details for the position of Commissioner, including terms of appointment and an application pack are available for download here.  Alternatively, further information, an application pack or alternative formats of the application pack can be requested by email to ecni2025@nio.gov.uk.   All applications should be submitted online where possible on the Cabinet Office website at: https://apply-for-public-appointment.service.gov.uk/roles.  The closing date for applications is 28 November 2025 at 12 noon. Late or incomplete applications will not be accepted.  Equality of Opportunity  Appointments will be made on merit and with regard to the equality provisions set out in the Northern Ireland Act 1998.  We welcome applications from all suitably experienced individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion or belief, political opinion, gender, sexual orientation, age, and disability. "
